getQuotesFromCertifiedShops: Get quotes from certified wrap shops.
faqDescription: Everything you need to know about the visualizer and finding a shop.
faq1Question: How accurate are the visualizer colors?
faq1Answer: We calibrate our digital swatches to match industry-standard vinyl codes from major manufacturers like 3M, Avery Dennison, and KPMF. However, monitor settings vary significantly. We highly recommend visiting a certified shop to see physical swatches in person before making a final decision.
faq2Question: What car models do you support?
faq2Answer: Our database includes over 450 popular enthusiast models, ranging from JDM classics and modern muscle to European luxury and supercars. We add new models weekly based on community votes. If your car isn't listed, you can submit a request through the Request Form.
faq3Question: How do I share my design with a shop?
faq3Answer: Once you've finalized your design in the builder, click the 'Share' button to generate a unique project link or a high-resolution PDF spec sheet. This sheet includes all the color codes and modification details, which you can email directly to any of our partner shops for an accurate quote.
faq4Question: Is there a fee to use the service?
faq4Answer: The visualizer tool and shop locator are 100% free for car owners. We are supported by our network of certified shops and vinyl manufacturers.
submitYourWrap: Submit your best "Night City" wrap design before Friday.
